; Level 4 — Cats and Chaos (Extended)
; Format: symbol x y [width] [extra]
;   P = player start
;   # = platform (x y width height)
;   S = spike pit   (x y width height)
;   L = lava pit    (x y width height)
;   B = baby        (x floor_y min_x max_x)
;   C = cat         (x floor_y min_x max_x)
;   G = goal ball   (x y color)

P 80 724

; ── Ground with gaps (first half) ──
# 0    760 500 40
# 600  760 400 40
# 1100 760 300 40
# 1500 760 500 40
# 2100 760 300 40
# 2500 760 400 40
# 3000 760 500 40

; ── Ground with gaps (second half) ──
# 3600 760 400 40
# 4100 760 500 40
# 4700 760 300 40
# 5100 760 500 40
# 5700 760 300 40
# 6100 760 400 40
# 6600 760 500 40

; ── Upper platforms (first half) ──
# 150  620 250 20
# 450  520 200 20
# 800  600 200 20
# 1050 480 200 20
# 1300 560 200 20
# 1600 440 220 20
# 1900 540 200 20
# 2200 420 200 20
# 2500 520 200 20
# 2800 440 200 20
# 3100 560 200 20

; ── Upper platforms (second half) ──
# 3500 620 250 20
# 3800 520 200 20
# 4150 600 200 20
# 4400 480 200 20
# 4700 560 200 20
# 5000 440 220 20
# 5300 540 200 20
# 5600 420 200 20
# 5900 520 200 20
# 6200 440 200 20
# 6500 560 200 20

# 300  360 200 20
# 700  300 180 20
# 1100 340 200 20
# 1500 300 180 20
# 1900 340 200 20
# 2300 300 200 20
# 2700 340 180 20
# 3100 300 200 20

; ── High platforms (second half) ──
# 3600 360 200 20
# 4000 300 180 20
# 4400 340 200 20
# 4800 300 180 20
# 5200 340 200 20
# 5600 300 200 20
# 6000 340 180 20
# 6500 300 200 20

; ── Spike pits (first half) ──
S 500 744 100 24
S 1000 744 100 24
S 1400 744 100 24
S 2000 744 100 24
S 2400 744 100 24
S 2900 744 100 24
S 3500 744 200 24

S 3900 744 100 24

S 5400 744 100 24

S 6300 744 100 24
S 6800 744 200 24

; ── Lava pits (first half) ──
L 600 648 200 60
L 2200 648 180 60

; ── Lava pits (second half) ──
L 4000 648 200 60
L 5500 648 180 60

; ── Extra lava in the middle ──
L 3400 648 200 60

; ── Goal ball (purple) ──
G 6800 710 purple
